title: Single-cell transcriptome sequencing data of mouse retinal endothelial cells
author: Wei, Yanhong
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
WT_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5 :   Single-cell RNA sequencing was performed on   enriched     endothelial cell suspensions obtained from retinal tissues of P15   WT mice subjected to OIR model.  
   mutain_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5 : Single-cell RNA sequencing was performed on   enriched    endothelial cell suspensions obtained from retinal tissues of P15 BAZ2B-ECKO mice subjected to OIR model.
steps_raw:
WT_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5 :   Single-cell RNA sequencing was performed on   enriched     endothelial cell suspensions obtained from retinal tissues of P15   WT mice subjected to OIR model.  
   mutain_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5 : Single-cell RNA sequencing was performed on   enriched    endothelial cell suspensions obtained from retinal tissues of P15 BAZ2B-ECKO mice subjected to OIR model.
